people.name: Isaac Lebwohl-Steiner
people.title: Board Chair
people.bio: Isaac has been coming to ECRS his entire life and currently serves as Board Chair. He leads improv, cooperative and theater games, Small Scenes, and other ways to play at ECRS events. He has served on various committees over the years. He invites you to join him at ECRS for the same reason he leads here: to connect with a caring community and play – just because we can.

people.name: Catherine Woods
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Catherine Woods is the daughter of long-time ECRS love-birds Steve & Martha Woods, and a member from childhood. As an adult, she has regularly led crafts and dance classes and is always looking for an opportunity to goof around. Outside of camp, she spends her time working as an urban farmer in Chicago, IL, where she lives with her partner Alice.

people.name: Fern Lox
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Fern has been an ECRS member for over 25 years when a friend realized that she needed to have more fun. She was hooked from her first Stony Point weekend! Fern is retired from a career in public K-12 education as a teacher, staff developer, and administrator.

people.name: Judi Powers
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Judi has been a member of the ECRS family for over 10years. She has her blue belt in NIA and is a certified instructor for Moving to Heal. She loves teaching joy of movement-moving your body's way. Dancing is an experience that can be so uplifting and healing on many levels-in a group it's just infectious! She lives in the Adirondack Mountains where she enjoys her many outdoor passions from skiing to gardening. She is a licensed Adirondack guide in hiking, camping and whitewater. She is part of the local theater group of dancing witches. Hope you come join me and share some smiles!
